turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Namaste, mujhe ENT specialist se milna hai. Appointment mil sakta hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Namaste! Haan, zaroor. Aapka naam aur number please?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Shukriya Deepak ji. Humara ENT specialist Dr. Arun Mahajan hai. Unka agle Somvaar aur Mangalvaar ko slot available hai.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Somvaar theek rahega. Subah ka koi slot hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan, Somvaar subah 10 AM aur 11:30 AM available hai.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ho gaya. Deepak Shinde, Somvaar 10:00 AM, Dr. Arun Mahajan. Confirmation SMS milega. Aur kuch chahiye?
